title: algorithmic-art
purpose: Create generative art using p5.js with seeded randomness, algorithmic philosophies, and interactive parameter controls.
when: When creating generative or procedural art, algorithmic visual compositions, or p5.js-based interactive art pieces.

title: makepad-animator
purpose: Implement Makepad animation states and transitions with forward timing, snap changes, and shader uniform animation.
when: When building Makepad UI animations with hover, focus, pressed, or custom state transitions.

title: makepad-shader-lab
purpose: Write Makepad custom pixel shaders using Sdf2d, uniforms, gradients, and rounded-box rendering.
when: When creating custom visual effects in Makepad using shader code, SDF shapes, or gradient fills.

title: scroll-experience
purpose: Build scroll-driven web animations using GSAP ScrollTrigger, Framer Motion, Locomotive Scroll, Lenis, and CSS scroll-timeline.
when: When creating scroll-based animations, parallax effects, or cinematic scrolling experiences on the web.

title: glsl-shader-alchemist
purpose: Write GPU shaders using GLSL for WebGL, Three.js, or game engines, covering vertex and fragment shaders, uniforms, and vector math.
when: When writing custom visual effects in GLSL, optimizing GPU rendering, or implementing post-processing shaders.

title: spline-3d-integration
purpose: Embed interactive 3D scenes from Spline.design into web projects with vanilla JS, React, Next.js, and Vue integration.
when: When embedding Spline 3D scenes into websites, handling Spline event listeners, or optimizing Spline performance.

title: threejs-animation
purpose: Implement Three.js procedural and keyframe animation using Timer, AnimationClip, AnimationMixer, and AnimationAction.
when: When animating Three.js objects with procedural motion, keyframe tracks, or playing GLTF animation clips.

title: threejs-fundamentals
purpose: Set up Three.js core infrastructure including scene, camera, renderer, fog, import maps, responsive resize, and animation loop.
when: When starting a new Three.js project, setting up scene infrastructure, or configuring camera, renderer, and responsive layout.

title: threejs-geometry
purpose: Work with Three.js built-in geometries, custom BufferGeometry, instanced meshes, and geometry merging.
when: When creating 3D shapes, custom geometry, or optimizing draw calls with instancing and geometry merging.

title: threejs-interaction
purpose: Implement Three.js user interaction with OrbitControls, raycasting, mouse picking, and click detection.
when: When adding user interaction to Three.js scenes including camera controls, object picking, or mouse-based events.

title: threejs-lighting
purpose: Configure Three.js lighting systems including ambient, directional, hemisphere, point, and spot lights with shadow mapping.
when: When adding or configuring lights, shadows, or environment maps in a Three.js scene.

title: threejs-loaders
purpose: Load external assets in Three.js using GLTFLoader, TextureLoader, LoadingManager, and model post-processing.
when: When loading 3D models, textures, or other assets into a Three.js scene with progress tracking and error handling.

title: threejs-materials
purpose: Work with Three.js material types including MeshBasicMaterial, MeshLambertMaterial, MeshStandardMaterial, and PBR workflows.
when: When selecting, configuring, or optimizing materials for Three.js meshes including PBR, transparency, and texture mapping.

title: threejs-postprocessing
purpose: Apply Three.js post-processing effects using EffectComposer, RenderPass, UnrealBloomPass, and custom shader passes.
when: When adding bloom, blur, color correction, or other post-processing effects to a Three.js scene.

title: threejs-shader-forge
purpose: Create custom Three.js ShaderMaterial and RawShaderMaterial with GLSL vertex and fragment shaders, uniforms, and TSL NodeMaterial.
when: When writing custom shaders for Three.js objects, using ShaderMaterial, or working with TSL NodeMaterial for WebGPU.

title: threejs-textures
purpose: Load, configure, and optimize textures in Three.js including async loading, mipmaps, compression, and texture atlases.
when: When loading, applying, or optimizing textures for Three.js materials.
